purpose: Canonical private structured context source map for future ChatGPT, Codex, and agent personalization.

privacy_contract.repository_policy: GitHub stores redacted derived context, schemas, templates, and audit logs only.
privacy_contract.raw_private_policy: Raw exports, full transcripts, browser state, cookies, and plaintext secrets stay local or encrypted and are referenced by secret_ref/local_ref only.
privacy_contract.writeback_policy: Every meaningful memory/profile/preference/taste/history/pattern update must update the mapped files and append a run log.

layers.name: 核心画像 / Core Profile
layers.purpose: High-weight durable identity, communication preferences, collaboration standards, stable taste, long-term plans, and safety boundaries.

layers.name: 一般长期上下文 / Project And Decision Memory
layers.purpose: Project index, decision log, workflows, medium/long-term constraints, reusable context, and accepted active memory.

layers.name: 行为历史与模式 / Behavior History And Patterns
layers.purpose: Redacted chronological activity, Codex behavior summaries, recurring execution patterns, candidate memory, weekly/monthly packs, and temporary sensitive references.

who_i_am.purpose: Stable identity, preference, taste, collaboration style, and safety boundaries for future agents.

how_i_work.purpose: Operational rules, answer style, validation expectations, and Codex collaboration flow.

resources_to_load.purpose: Intent-based resource routing and conditional loading policy.
